hero.kicker: Personal Life & Wellness · Ansiversa mini app
hero.title: Family Task Planner
hero.description: Organize household responsibilities, assign family ownership, and keep daily work moving without turning home life into project management.

flow.title: Plan → Assign → Complete
steps: Create tasks with assignee, category, priority, due date, recurring option, status, and notes
Complete, reopen, duplicate, and review work by date or insight

differences.title: A household task planner, not a work project board
differences.description: Family Task Planner keeps the workflow centered on home responsibilities, family members, and recurring daily coordination.

items.title: Assign
items.description: Tasks can be assigned to family members or left unassigned when ownership is not decided.

items.title: Organize
items.description: Categories keep household, cleaning, kitchen, shopping, kids, bills, outdoor, pets, and other work easy to scan.

items.title: Review
items.description: Dashboard, calendar, and insights views show what is due, overdue, complete, and unevenly distributed.

feel.title: A calm family coordination workspace
feel.description: The app favors practical task capture, visible ownership, and quick completion actions over corporate project-management complexity.

items.title: Today first
items.description: The dashboard highlights due-today and upcoming responsibilities.

items.title: Easy ownership
items.description: Family members and categories make the task list understandable at a glance.

items.title: Simple review
items.description: Calendar and insights views summarize work without requiring a complex planning system.

audiences.title: Who uses Family Task Planner
audiences.description: Family Task Planner is useful for households that need shared visibility into everyday responsibilities.

items.title: Families
items.description: Coordinate chores, errands, bills, shopping, and kid-related tasks.

items.title: Couples and shared homes
items.description: Split responsibilities clearly without long message threads.

items.title: Caregivers
items.description: Keep recurring household support tasks visible and reviewable.

resourceSection.title: Family Task Planner essentials
resourceSection.description: The workflow is built around practical household task coordination.

items.title: Task management
items.description: Create, edit, delete, duplicate, complete, reopen, search, filter, and sort tasks.

items.title: Household setup
items.description: Maintain family members and categories with active or inactive status.

items.title: Review surfaces
items.description: Use dashboard, calendar, and insights views to understand upcoming work and completion patterns.

groupedSection.title: From household setup to daily review
groupedSection.description: The app supports a clear loop from setup to execution and reflection.

items.name: Family Members
items.description: Add household members with optional color or avatar placeholders.

items.name: Categories
items.description: Create everyday household categories for easier task scanning.

items.name: Tasks
items.description: Create, assign, complete, reopen, duplicate, and delete responsibilities.

items.name: Calendar and Insights
items.description: Review scheduled tasks, completion rate, pending work, overdue work, member activity, and category distribution.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: Family Task Planner follows the shared mini-app workflow pattern with protected routes and isolated backend ownership.
items: Protected workflow routes inside the persistent shell.
Isolated family task database and API module.
Lightweight dashboard/list responses with detail responses for editing.

finalCta.title: Open Family Task Planner
finalCta.description: Explore the Family Task Planner dashboard.
